Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star. Features the "As The Stomach Turns" saga, and Harvey getting medical advice.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.
Video.title: Paul Sand

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars. Includes Harvey's proposal, Roddy & Carol working, and a spoof of "The Little Foxes."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball is in hot water with his wife. Then, a nervous woman finds her spouse pushing her buttons.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Sketches include an encounter at a bar between Harvey & Carol, and Carol & Vicki as "Lucky Lady" contestants.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Carol's series premiere guest is Jim Nabors. Plus "V.I.P." interview with Shirley Dimple.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Guests Rich Little & Eydie Gorme join in a tribute to Alfred Hitchcock! Also: Carol and Harvey play a couple.
Video.title: Rich Little, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Ken Berry joins a salute to Warner Brothers, with spoofs of "Mrs. Skeffington" and "Yankee Doodle Dandy."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests as Carol's cabinmate. A "V.I.P." interview with Lynda Bird and a demonstration of E.S.P.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Alan King & Lena Zavaroni join Carol for sketches set on Hollywood Boulevard, a baseball game, and a bus stop.
Video.title: Alan King, Lena Zavaroni

Video.summary: Don Rickles guests as a house painter on this "Carol & Sis" sketch. Harvey and Carol face a home invasion.
Video.title: Don Rickles

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Carol's old friends Garry Moore and Durward Kirby visit for the holidays.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Carol is a dowdy secretary discouraging applicants, and the movie spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi & Jack Gilford star in "Snow White- 15 Years Later." An accident causes problems on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Jack Gilford

Video.summary: David Hartman & Paula Kelly star! Features Nora Desmond and George and Zelda. Also: "This Is Your Lifetime."
Video.title: David Hartman, Paula Kelly

Video.summary: Carol's guests are George Chakiris and Shirley Jones!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns as a guest! Sketches include Harvey as a hammy actor, and Jim as an emergency room patient.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Helen Reddy & John Byner appear in parodies. John is in a "Nora Desmond" sketch, and Vicki plays columnist.
Video.title: Helen Reddy, John Byner

Video.summary: The third season finale "Family Show" features the cast of regulars at their very best.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show
